hero.description: Focused on building scalable, high-performance solutions with an excellent user experience. I transform ideas into digital products.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: More than lines of code, I build solutions focused on architecture, scalability, and clarity.
about.paragraph2: I use AI as a strategic partner in my daily workflow to speed up testing, refactoring, and debugging while keeping quality and consistency high.
about.paragraph3: Outside the screen, calm keeps me grounded. In nature or watching a good anime, I recharge my energy.

projects.title: My
projects.description: Some projects I built by applying my skills in real-world scenarios.

errors.submitLater: Error sending message. Please try again later.

successModal.title: Message sent!
successModal.description: Thanks for getting in touch. I will reply as soon as possible!
